radius.$description: Material 3 dimension used by the textarea component for radius.

border-block-start-width.$description: Material 3 dimension used by the textarea component for border block start width.

border-block-end-width.$description: Material 3 dimension used by the textarea component for border block end width.

border-inline-start-width.$description: Material 3 dimension used by the textarea component for border inline start width.

border-inline-end-width.$description: Material 3 dimension used by the textarea component for border inline end width.

bg.$description: Material 3 color used by the textarea component for rest background.

fg.$description: Material 3 color used by the textarea component for rest foreground.

border.$description: Material 3 color used by the textarea component for rest border.

placeholder-fg.$description: Material 3 color used by the textarea component for rest placeholder foreground.

placeholder-fg.$description: Material 3 color used by the textarea component for hover placeholder foreground.

bg.$description: Material 3 color used by the textarea component for invalid background.
